name: Decepticon Siphon-Bot
oracle_text:
Combine.
Whenever an artifact creature you control dies, target opponent loses 1 life.
flavor_text: The most efficient way to win a war is to ensure the enemy simply runs out of parts.
design_notes: This card is designed as the signpost uncommon for the WB 'Decepticon Tyranny' archetype. It embodies the theme of attrition and life drain by providing a death trigger that rewards sacrificing low-cost artifacts (the core of the deck). By including the Combine mechanic, it also supports the recursion/big artifact subtheme, allowing players to potentially reassemble their discarded units into larger threats later in the game. The mana cost {1}{W}{B} and stats 2/2 are balanced for an uncommon-tier engine that requires specific board states or graveyard setup to fully realize its value.
